query: UPDATE blog_posts SET content = REPLACE(content, 'editpdf.online', 'pdfup.io') WHERE content LIKE '%editpdf.online%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4AvtuQasrcUbqPZ.root --database HUwJ6fxw58gKVZz5QkmFWk --execute UPDATE blog_posts SET content = REPLACE(content, 'editpdf.online', 'pdfup.io') WHERE content LIKE '%editpdf.online%';
